messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Events

### Event Rule

```hcl
resource "oci_events_rule" "rule" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-rule"
  is_enabled   = true

  condition = jsonencode({
    "eventType" : ["com.oraclecloud.computeapi.createinstance"],
    "eventTypeCategory" : ["COMPUTE"]
  })

  actions {
    action_type = "ONS"
    topic_id  = oci_ons_topic.topic.id
  }
}
```

### ONS Topic

```hcl
resource "oci_ons_topic" "topic" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name          = "my-topic"
  description  = "Notifications topic"
}
```

### Subscription

```hcl
resource "oci_ons_subscription" "subscription" {
  topic_id    = oci_ons_topic.topic.id
  protocol   = "EMAIL"
  endpoint   = "admin@example.com"
}
```

### Use Cases

- Instance lifecycle
- Object Storage changes
- DB events
